Alchemilla mollis, commonly known as lady's mantle, is a perennial herb with a history of traditional use in folk medicine. It is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help soothe digestive issues and reduce oxidative stress. 

The bioactive constituents of Alchemilla mollis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
